name: aws-security-hub
description: AWS Security Hub — central security findings aggregator across AWS services.
title: aws-security-hub

llmHints.on_match: Security Hub query observed. Findings JSON captured as a product; subjects are findingArn entries.

positiveSetup: Invoke cilock with argv starting "aws securityhub"
negativeSetup: Invoke cilock with unrelated argv (e.g. `echo unrelated`)
